visuals.title: String Comparison Process Flow
visuals.description: Visual diagram for String Comparison Process Flow
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">String Comparison and Searching</text>

  <!-- String A -->
  <rect x="60" y="70" width="300" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="white" opacity="0">
    "HELLO WORLD"
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- String B -->
  <rect x="60" y="130" width="300" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="white" opacity="0">
    "HELLO UNIVERSE"
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Comparison Arrow -->
  <path d="M210 170 L210 200" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="0" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Result Box -->
  <rect x="160" y="210" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="235" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="white" opacity="0">
    DIFFERENT
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Pattern Box -->
  <rect x="60" y="280" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="120" y="305" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Pattern: "WOR"
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Search Arrow -->
  <path d="M180 280 L240 280" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead2)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead2" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="0" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Result Box -->
  <rect x="240" y="280" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="300" y="305" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Found at pos: 7
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Labels -->
  <text x="210" y="55" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    String Comparison
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    String Searching
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
